evals.prompt: Given mixed headless and UI evidence for one user-facing capability, design the durable HarnessScenario and Harness Coverage Matrix.
evals.expected_output: Uses HarnessScenario with claim_ceiling, not_claimed, not_proven, evidence refs, and remaining_gaps; separates headless_product from interface_headless/render_wiring/browser_visible coverage; uses headless_sublevel only under headless_product.

evals.prompt: Audit a harness plan that treats fixture data and a browser screenshot as proof of accepted business facts.
evals.expected_output: Rejects overclaiming; states that fixtures and browser-visible proof do not own product truth; requires paired headless product evidence or records business_fact_claim=false in not_claimed.

evals.prompt: Review a retired Harness Route that was replaced by final product UI and regression tests.
evals.expected_output: Requires replacement evidence or recorded remaining_gaps before retirement; keeps raw run artifacts out of durable docs unless summarized or redacted; preserves trace refs.
